title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Prince Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
